description: Warn-only regression floors for the op-outcome report. NON-BLOCKING by design: op-outcomes is non-deterministic and report-only, so report.mjs prints a ⚠️ line when a category's completion rate falls below its floor or give-up rises above the ceiling, but never exits non-zero and never gates a commit. Floors sit a few points under observed rates to absorb run-to-run noise; raise them when the bar genuinely moves.
